item.title: Living Like It’s Always Girls’ Day
item.description: From laughs to shared moments, this captures the joy of making everyday life feel like a celebration with friends.

media:content.media:title: Living Like It’s Always Girls’ Day
media:content.media:description: From laughs to shared moments, this captures the joy of making everyday life feel like a celebration with friends.

item.title: This Might Be My Best Outfit Yet
item.description: Sometimes an outfit just comes in clucth in the weirdest moment. I always get asked out or hit on in this one. Weird or on point?

media:content.media:title: This Might Be My Best Outfit Yet
media:content.media:description: Sometimes an outfit just comes in clucth in the weirdest moment. I always get asked out or hit on in this one. Weird or on point?

item.title: The Movie That Makes Long Flights Fly By
item.description: Looking for something to watch on your next trip? This pick is ideal for staying entertained from takeoff to landing.

media:content.media:title: The Movie That Makes Long Flights Fly By
media:content.media:description: Looking for something to watch on your next trip? This pick is ideal for staying entertained from takeoff to landing.

item.title: My golf caddie
item.description: She is the best thing that ever been mine!

media:content.media:description: She is the best thing that ever been mine!
